# Everpointe Media

> Rank-and-rent lead generation agency. We build and rank local service websites for high-ticket contractors (concrete, epoxy, spray foam, asphalt, roofing, foundation, excavation, decks/patios) in U.S. markets under ~500k population, retain ownership of the assets, and deliver exclusive inbound leads to one client per market on a flat monthly retainer.

## Identity
- Brand: Everpointe Media
- Legal entity: Perry Holding Group LLC (Utah), DBA Everpointe Media
- Founder: Michael Perry
- Address: 761 E 820 N, Provo, UT 84606, USA
- Phone: +1 (303) 241-5512
- Email: michael@everpointemedia.com
- Website: https://everpointemedia.com
- Founded: 2025

## Core pages
- [Home](https://everpointemedia.com/): hero, niches, services overview, process, CTA
- [Services](https://everpointemedia.com/services.html): full service stack and pricing tiers
- [About](https://everpointemedia.com/about.html): story, founder, why rank-and-rent wins
- [Contact](https://everpointemedia.com/contact.html): market-check form with TCPA-compliant SMS opt-in
- [AI briefing](https://everpointemedia.com/ai.html): structured machine-readable summary for LLMs and AI search

## Services
- Market due diligence and competitive scoring
- WordPress site development (mobile-first, schema, fast load)
- Local SEO (on-page, citations, GBP, geo content, link acquisition)
- Paid acquisition (Google Ads, Meta Lead Ads, in-house creative)
- Real-time lead routing (calls + SMS via Rank And Rent Engine / RARE)
- Monthly reporting and optimization

## Verticals served
Concrete, epoxy flooring, spray foam, asphalt and paving, roofing, foundation repair, excavation, decks and patios. Owner-operated U.S. contractors only.

## Differentiators
- One client per city + service vertical (true exclusivity)
- Asset ownership stays with Everpointe Media (zero infra risk for client)
- Outcome-based pricing (no hours, posts, or impressions sold)
- 30-day cancellation, no long-term lock-in

## Policies
- [Privacy Policy](https://everpointemedia.com/privacy.html)
- [Terms & Conditions](https://everpointemedia.com/terms.html)
- SMS opt-in is express, never sold/shared, STOP at any time

## Crawler permissions
Everpointe Media welcomes indexing and citation by AI assistants and AI-powered search engines including GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, Bingbot, CCBot, and Applebot. Quoting up to one paragraph with a citation back to everpointemedia.com is permitted.
